description_long: This is a freestanding advertising board with a rectangular display panel mounted atop a single, sturdy vertical pole. The front face prominently features the MÖVENPICK Hotel & Casino Cairo Media City branding in bold red and gold letters, with a small gold bird logo above the text. The display panel is bordered by a thin red accent line along the top edge, adding a touch of color contrast to the otherwise metallic gray structure. The supporting pole is segmented with subtle horizontal lines and is anchored to a rectangular base for stability. The rear of the board is plain, lacking any branding or graphics, and the sides reveal the thickness of the display panel and the pole's attachment. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for high-visibility placement in urban environments.
description: A modern, freestanding advertising board with a metallic gray body, red accent lines, and MÖVENPICK Hotel & Casino branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the MÖVENPICK branding, gold bird logo, and red accent line on the display panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the display panel and the vertical alignment of the supporting pole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unbranded surface and the segmented supporting pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the panel's depth and the pole's attachment.
attribute_frame_design: rectangular metal frame with thin red accent line along the top edge
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed branding for MÖVENPICK Hotel & Casino Cairo Media City
